LanguageData.VPE_CasterGear.description: Craft ritual clothing, armor, and focus gear suited to occultists and their cryptic revelations.
LanguageData.VPE_CasterGear.label: occult regalia
LanguageData.VPE_EltexGear.description: Recover and tailor advanced relic-woven apparel, staves, and focus gear that amplify cryptid insight.
LanguageData.VPE_EltexGear.label: relic regalia
